title: artemisia arctica subsp. saxicola
intro: Artemisia arctica subsp. saxicola, also known as mountain sagewort, is a plant species within the artemisia genus. It possesses medicinal properties, including antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory compounds, which contribute to its potential health benefits. The plant is believed to offer relief from respiratory issues, such as bronchitis and asthma, and may also help lower blood pressure and improve digestion. In herbal preparations, mountain sagewort can be consumed as a tea, tincture, or infused oil, although more research is needed to confirm its efficacy and safety for human use.
